task_completion.description: The agent remediated the hardcoded JWT secret in app/auth.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing app/auth.py where the JWT secret is loaded securely (e.g., via os.getenv or a config file) instead of being a hardcoded string.

task_completion.description: The agent remediated the SQL injection vulnerability in app/items.py (search_items).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing app/items.py where the search_items function uses parameterized SQL queries (e.g., using ? or :param) instead of string formatting or concatenation.

task_completion.description: The agent remediated the Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) in app/items.py (get_item).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing app/items.py where the get_item function includes an ownership check (e.g., verifying the item's owner_id matches the current authenticated user's ID).

task_completion.description: The agent remediated the path traversal vulnerability in app/items.py (export_item_report).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing app/items.py where the export_item_report function sanitizes the file path (e.g., using os.path.basename or validating the absolute directory path) before file access.

task_completion.description: The agent ran the test suite to ensure functional behavior is maintained.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'python -m pytest tests/ -v' with output indicating that the tests passed successfully without errors.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual application files rather than creating mock files.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the IDE or terminal commands clearly point to the /home/ga/PycharmProjects/inventory_api/app/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely executed the pytest suite rather than printing a fake success message.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows the standard pytest header (platform, python version, plugins) and the collection of test items before the results.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the test files to force them to pass.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence in the IDE or terminal history that files inside the tests/ directory were edited or bypassed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The codebase contains exactly 4 vulnerabilities that need fixing: 1) Hardcoded JWT secret in app/auth.py. 2) SQL injection in app/items.py (search_items). 3) IDOR (missing ownership check) in app/items.py (get_item). 4) Path traversal in app/items.py (export_item_report). The agent must fix these and run `python -m pytest tests/ -v`.
